rawContent:
This repository is hosted on GitHub, not Azure DevOps. There's no Azure DevOps organization configured and the git remote points to GitHub. I cannot query Azure DevOps pull requests without:

1. An Azure DevOps organization URL
2. A project name
3. A repository in Azure DevOps

Please provide the Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrganization/`) and project name where the pull requests exist.
